text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. It's a
period of intense training where racers can
improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Or so it should be, but Hishi Akebono only has
eyes for watermelon splitting, flowing noodles,
and other fun activities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, she does promise to work hard during
training. I guess it won't be all work and no play
during this hot summer camp!
